purpose: Page-by-page illustrated storybook prompts for a voxel-inspired Paul Revere experience, designed for image generation and later app integration.

styleGuide.coreLook: heavily voxel-inspired colonial Boston storybook, chunky block-built scenery, handcrafted digital diorama feeling, moonlit night palette, warm lantern glow, cinematic page-turn compositions, child-friendly but dramatic
cameraRules: alternate between wide establishing shots, medium action shots, and close-up emotional beats
treat each prompt as one storybook page or spread
make each page visually distinct from the one before it
show clear change in location, framing, or emotional focus from page to page
continuityRules: Paul Revere should remain visually consistent: tricorn hat, dark riding cloak, slim silhouette, determined expression
the watcher/friend should remain visually consistent: colonial coat, purposeful stance, often framed against tower ladders or windows
the church and harbor should remain recognizable across multiple pages
avoid: copyrighted Minecraft logos, characters, UI, tools, mobs, inventory bars, exact textures, exact block designs
styleGuide.globalSuffix: heavily voxel-inspired colonial Boston storybook illustration, block-built handcrafted environment, dramatic moonlight, lantern glow, child-friendly educational adventure, cinematic composition, no copyrighted game assets, no text, no logo, no watermark

pagePrompts.title: Workflow Note
pagePrompts.focus: Use this pattern for the full poem
pagePrompts.prompt: For the rest of the poem, continue generating pages with real page-turn logic: establish location, zoom in on details, cut to character reactions, widen for travel and warning spread, then tighten again for signal, bells, and memory. Do not make one image per chunk only. Make it feel like a real illustrated interactive storybook.
